title: Platform runtime timebase regression matrix
goal: Turn the platform runtime timebase branch into a repeatable focused regression matrix for timer, sleep, and handoff state.
next_actions: List the focused timer, sleep, and runtime bootstrap probes currently covered.
Find one missing regression case that can be expressed without private infrastructure.
Add the regression and document the expected smoke marker.
acceptance: The matrix has named checks tied to commands or CTest targets.
At least one missing high-value timebase regression is closed.
The branch stays green under the focused platform validation set.
